scope.target: native threshold ML-DSA-65 with an untrusted aggregator and no reconstructed signing key or seed
scope.security_model: static Byzantine corruption of at most t - 1 validators

claim_boundary.rule: Evidence packaging, review readiness, an internal review, or an aggregation run does not discharge a mathematical obligation. Final theorem closure additionally requires independent validation.

backend_emission_capture.substantive_effect: strict partial-aggregation standard-verifier evidence only; production DKG/custody remains blocked

fips204_exact_public_key_from_supplied_s.scope: derive exact ML-DSA-65 public-key bytes from caller-supplied additive or Shamir module-secret shares bound to rho and a caller-supplied ceremony digest

verified_properties: fixed-seed byte parity with the standard ML-DSA-65 provider
additive supplied-share derivation and input-order invariance
Shamir threshold-subset derivation and subthreshold fail-closed behavior
rho and ceremony-digest binding, uniqueness, and complete-share validation

fips204_exact_joint_expand_s_secret_samp.blocker: No joint protocol derives rho_prime, s1, and s2 with the exact FIPS ExpandS distribution while retaining authenticated secret shares.

joint_unbiasable_rho_generation.blocker: The public-key derivation accepts caller-supplied rho and does not prevent last-mover bias through joint generation.

ceremony_context_construction_and_authen.blocker: The component enforces equality of a caller-supplied digest but does not construct or authenticate the epoch, validator, threshold, commitment, and protocol transcript it represents.

distributed_secret_k_generation.blocker: The FIPS signing seed K is not generated or retained in authenticated shares.

fips204_retained_t0_signing_state.blocker: The public-output derivation returns exact t0 but does not bind retained public or authenticated shared t0 state into the finalized epoch and Sign_internal.

encrypted_receiver_custody_seam.scope: in-process dealer-and-receiver-bound authenticated ciphertext bundles and receiver-pinned validated share vaults
encrypted_receiver_custody_seam.transport_profile: separately provisioned per-(dealer, receiver) PSK SHAKE256 reference interface

production_pq_private_share_transport.blocker: The reference seam assumes pre-shared keys and is not ML-KEM key exchange, a reviewed production AEAD, or forward-secure transport.

process_isolated_private_share_custody.blocker: In-process computation and fixtures do not prove validator-process isolation, HSM enforcement, complete erasure, or OS-enforced private custody.

persistent_receiver_replay_state.blocker: Accepted-envelope replay memory is in process only; restart-safe ceremony/dealer sequence storage and rollback resistance are absent.

malicious_secure_dkg_proof.blocker: Public/secret consistency, shortness, binding, hiding, extraction, complaint, agreement, robustness, anti-framing, and key-bias proofs are incomplete.

secret_share_vss_and_shortness_proof.blocker: Supplied shares are not proved short, exactly distributed, or bound to accepted VSS commitments.

public_secret_relation_proof.blocker: No proof binds each public t contribution to the same secret share accepted by the DKG commitments.

authenticated_complaint_and_recovery.blocker: Pairwise-PSK frame authentication is not a signed public dealer identity, and no complete complaint, exclusion, and recovery protocol is wired to the derivation.

fips204_shared_signing_state.blocker: The path does not produce exact shared K and tr or bind retained t0 state for Sign_internal.

fips204_exact_distributed_key_generation.blocker: Exact public-key derivation and an encrypted in-process custody seam are only sub-capabilities; secret sampling, process isolation, production transport, shared signing state, and malicious-secure proof remain open.

criterion_promotion.rule: Exact public-key bytes from supplied shares do not discharge a theorem criterion or prove distributed key generation.

required_run_properties: real partial response and hint aggregation
FIPS 204 rejection predicates over threshold partials

required_artifacts: exact distributed ExpandMask construction or selected alternative
machine-checkable distribution argument
explicit Renyi or statistical-distance bound
parameter-specialized distribution comparison corpus
blockers: The additive Stack A mask leaves epsilon_mask open.
No production bound proves equivalence or acceptable distance from centralized ML-DSA-65 masks.

required_artifacts: real threshold recomputation transcript
exact norm, hint, challenge, and retry predicate equivalence proof
full ML-DSA-65 KAT and adversarial mutation corpus
standard-verifier acceptance evidence from real threshold outputs
blockers: The 10000-validator capture does not verify a real distributed threshold core.
Distributed DKG, partial z_i and hint aggregation, and FIPS rejection over threshold partials are absent from the captured backend.

required_artifacts: formal retry-domain separation proof
selective-abort and last-mover leakage model
adversarial abort and retry corpus
accepted-signature distribution proof with explicit bound
blockers: No proof bounds information leaked by abort timing, retries, or participant-controlled omission.
No proof connects accepted threshold outputs after retries to the ML-DSA-65 accepted distribution.

required_artifacts: production LocalAccept specification and proof
VSS/DKG binding, hiding, extraction, agreement, and key-bias proofs
context-binding proof and cross-session adversarial corpus
zero-knowledge or audited local-verification leakage proof
blockers: The current executable local algebraic verifier consumes y_i and s1_i in the clear.
The research VSS/DKG implementation lacks a complete malicious-secure proof and is not wired to real standard-verifier-compatible aggregation.

required_artifacts: threshold EUF-CMA reduction
precise base ML-DSA theorem citation and assumption mapping
real-to-ideal simulator
H0 through H5 hybrid transitions with explicit bounds
blockers: FST-T2 has no completed simulator or distinguishing bounds.
The selected production protocol is not complete enough to instantiate either proof.

obligations.title: threshold unforgeability
obligations.blocker: FST-L1 through FST-L7 and the threshold EUF-CMA reduction are not discharged.

obligations.title: real/ideal threshold-signing realization
obligations.blocker: FST-L1 through FST-L9, a complete simulator, and explicit H0-H5 bounds are absent.

obligations.title: transcript non-malleability
obligations.blocker: The exact production wire-encoding injectivity proof is absent.

obligations.title: implementation conformance gate
obligations.blocker: Conformance is necessary but cannot discharge FST-T1 or FST-T2.

obligations.title: canonical transcript injectivity
obligations.blocker: No proof covers the exact production byte encoding.

obligations.title: challenge binding
obligations.blocker: Implementation guards exist, but production commitment semantics and FST-L1 remain open.

obligations.title: validator-set soundness
obligations.blocker: Collection guards exist, but they require proof linkage to the selected production protocol.

obligations.title: partial-share validity
obligations.blocker: No leakage-safe production LocalAccept proof is complete.

obligations.title: aggregation correctness
obligations.blocker: No real no-reconstruction threshold core emits a standard-valid ML-DSA-65 signature.

obligations.title: no subthreshold signing
obligations.blocker: Sharing soundness, partial validity, and the unauthorized-output reduction are incomplete.

obligations.title: abort compatibility
obligations.blocker: No Fiat-Shamir-with-aborts preservation proof is complete for the threshold protocol.

obligations.title: ideal extraction
obligations.blocker: The real-to-ideal simulator and extraction argument are absent.

obligations.title: evidence noninterference
obligations.blocker: Anti-framing and evidence-leakage proofs are incomplete.

obligations.title: base ML-DSA-65 unforgeability theorem
obligations.blocker: The final proof must cite and map the accepted ML-DSA-65 theorem and model.

obligations.title: exact public-key derivation from supplied module-secret shares
obligations.blocker: Public-key conformance does not establish joint ExpandS sampling, retained t0 signing state, process-isolated custody, malicious-secure DKG, or shared signing state.

obligations.title: production backend conformance and KAT campaign
obligations.blocker: Current standard-verifier evidence is not emitted by a real no-reconstruction threshold core.

obligations.title: constant-time and side-channel discipline
obligations.blocker: No implementation side-channel audit is complete.
